text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The classic-year summer camp is an important
event which tests the limit of how much an
Umamusume can improve.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The bus is about to depart for camp, and
everyone is settling in for the trip.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Kita! Have you already decided who to sit
with yet? If not, come and join me!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oh no! I couldn't possibly sit next to you, Teio!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
How about sitting next to me, then? I'll share my
carrots with you!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
No, thank you! I appreciate the offer, Spe, but... I
can't accept.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Why not? Did we do something to upset you?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
No, that's not it at all! You've done nothing
wrong. I'm just being weird. Sorry...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It's just... it's hard to hang out with them because I
feel inferior to them...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Kitasan Black is still bothered by the
innate brilliance in Tokai Teio and Special Week
that we talked about before.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hey, Kita! Didja have lunch yet?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
If not, come eat with us! I got some corn us cool
kids can chow down on!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Golshi, Vodka! Sure, I'll join you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the other hand, she doesn't seem bothered by
Gold Ship or Vodka, an upperclassman who's
always trying to be cool.
choice_data_list:
You seem perfectly at home with Golshi and
Vodka, Kitasan.

You seem perfectly at home with Golshi and
Vodka, Kitasan.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Huh, I guess you're right. I don't feel any
particular need to keep a distance from them...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I wonder why, though. Both of them are incredible
racers, after all...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Of course we're incredible! Our hearts are jacked
up more than jackets themselves!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I don't know if I'd say we're incredible. I feel like
we're more like lawless rebels without a cause...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rebels... Vodka said it as an offhand comment,
but I feel like the answer to Kitasan Black's
question lies in that sentiment.
choice_data_list: Maybe it's because of their personalities...
Maybe it's because of their personalities...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean by that? What's because of
their personalities?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain how each Umamusume has a certain air
about them that is reflected in their personalities.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some have more standard personalities, while
others deviate from the norm—the outliers.
Kitasan Black probably finds it easier to approach
the latter. And if so...
choice_data_list:
You should try to talk to Golshi and Vodka a
lot this summer.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh? Okay, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I nod at her approvingly. I'm sure it'll help if
Kitasan Black receives guidance from a variety of
different upperclassmen.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey, if you can put up with us, we'll hang out with
you as much as you like!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
If you need someone to look up to, count me in!
I'll take good care of you!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Vodka! I really appreciate that!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Don't sweat it! I'll show you all the wildest
ways to have fun this summer!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Yeah! We'll teach ya right!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hang on, "we"? Golshi, your idea of fun goes waaay beyond wild...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm really hoping that Kitasan Black will be able
to shake off her inferiority complex this summer
with the help of other Umamusume.
